$comment: Web Everything assembler preset registry (#646/#667). Each entry is a shadcn-shaped registry-item: an ejectable recipe of plain-markup files that composes WE blocks/intents. The recipe IS the standard (#652 Fork 1) — no tool required to consume it. /presets/ renders this file; new presets are added as batch-time volume.

presets.name: reveal-nav
presets.title: Reveal navigation menu
presets.description: W3C APG Disclosure Navigation header: a row of section heads, each a real <button aria-expanded> disclosing its own panel. CSS baseline reveals on :hover/:focus-within; reveal-nav.js layers aria-expanded toggling + Esc/outside-click. This is the exact payload running live in the Web Everything dogfood header.

cem.name: RevealNav
cem.description: Composed-API surface of the reveal-nav preset — a W3C APG Disclosure Navigation header. Describes the authoring surface (#668), never the internal reveal-nav.js wiring. Rides the #653 CEM protocol.

attributes.name: aria-expanded
attributes.description: Disclosure state of each section head button — "true" while its panel is open.

attributes.name: aria-controls
attributes.description: Each section head points at the id of the panel it discloses.

slots.description: Nav sections — each a head <button> plus its disclosed panel of <a class="nav-link"> links.

x-webeverything.note: A composition, not a registered custom element — the CEM coexists with the plain-markup recipe (#652 Fork 1's API-descriptor layer).

presets.name: command-palette
presets.title: Command palette
presets.description: A ⌘K / Ctrl+K command palette: a modal dialog holding a type-ahead search input over a roving-focus command list. Baseline is a real <dialog> with a filterable <ul role="listbox">; command-palette.js layers the global shortcut, incremental filtering, and ArrowUp/Down + Enter selection. A composed recipe — no custom element required to consume it.

cem.name: CommandPalette
cem.description: Composed-API surface of the command-palette preset — a ⌘K modal command launcher. Describes the authoring surface (#668), never the internal command-palette.js wiring. Rides the #653 CEM protocol.

attributes.name: open
attributes.description: Reflects the dialog open state; toggled by the global shortcut or the trigger button.

attributes.name: aria-activedescendant
attributes.description: Id of the currently-highlighted command option in the listbox.

slots.description: Command options — each an <li role="option"> with a label and optional shortcut hint.

x-webeverything.note: A composition, not a registered custom element — the CEM coexists with the plain-markup recipe (#652 Fork 1 API-descriptor layer).

presets.name: filter-bar
presets.title: Filter bar
presets.description: A toolbar of filter controls over a collection: a search input, a segmented status toggle, and a multi-select facet dropdown, with a live result-count status and a clear-all action. Baseline is plain markup with real form controls; filter-bar.js debounces input and emits a single normalized filter-change event. A composed recipe — no custom element required to consume it.

cem.name: FilterBar
cem.description: Composed-API surface of the filter-bar preset — a row of filter controls over a collection. Describes the authoring surface (#668), never the internal filter-bar.js wiring. Rides the #653 CEM protocol.

attributes.name: aria-controls
attributes.description: Id of the collection region the bar filters.

slots.description: Filter controls — a search input, segmented toggles, and facet dropdowns.

x-webeverything.note: A composition, not a registered custom element — the CEM coexists with the plain-markup recipe (#652 Fork 1 API-descriptor layer).

presets.name: hovercard
presets.title: Hovercard
presets.description: A rich content preview disclosed on hover/focus of an inline trigger (the GitHub user-card pattern). Baseline is an <a> trigger paired with a hidden card region; hovercard.js layers hover-intent delay, focus support, and aria-describedby wiring so it stays keyboard- and screen-reader-accessible. A composed recipe — no custom element required to consume it.

cem.name: Hovercard
cem.description: Composed-API surface of the hovercard preset — a hover/focus content preview. Describes the authoring surface (#668), never the internal hovercard.js wiring. Rides the #653 CEM protocol.

attributes.name: aria-describedby
attributes.description: The trigger points at the id of the card region it discloses.

slots.description: Card body — arbitrary preview content (avatar, name, meta, actions).

x-webeverything.note: A composition, not a registered custom element — the CEM coexists with the plain-markup recipe (#652 Fork 1 API-descriptor layer).

files.content: @author Project Author @author Maintains the Web Everything standards constellation.

presets.name: toolbar
presets.title: Toolbar
presets.description: A W3C APG toolbar: a single-tab-stop row of grouped action buttons with roving tabindex and arrow-key navigation, including a toggle group and an overflow menu. Baseline is real <button>s in a role="toolbar"; toolbar.js layers the roving-tabindex arrow navigation and Home/End. A composed recipe — no custom element required to consume it.

cem.name: Toolbar
cem.description: Composed-API surface of the toolbar preset — a W3C APG roving-tabindex action toolbar. Describes the authoring surface (#668), never the internal toolbar.js wiring. Rides the #653 CEM protocol.

attributes.name: aria-label
attributes.description: Accessible name for the toolbar region.

slots.description: Toolbar items — action <button>s, toggle groups, and an overflow menu.

x-webeverything.note: A composition, not a registered custom element — the CEM coexists with the plain-markup recipe (#652 Fork 1 API-descriptor layer).
